description: Tenses, aspects, modal verbs, passive voice

topics.description: Actions that happened at an unspecified time or have present relevance

rules.rule: Use present perfect for actions that started in the past and continue to the present.
rules.example: I have studied English for five years.
rules.ielts_usage: Common in Speaking Part 1 when discussing experiences and changes.

rules.rule: Use present perfect for recent past actions with present relevance.
rules.example: Scientists have discovered a new treatment.
rules.ielts_usage: Use in Writing Task 1 to describe recent trends.

medium: Research has demonstrated the effectiveness of this approach.
Technological advancements have transformed communication methods.
ielts: Globalization has increased economic interdependence among nations.
Environmental awareness campaigns have raised public consciousness about sustainability issues.
academic: Recent scholarship has challenged traditional interpretations of historical events.
Empirical studies have substantiated the theoretical predictions derived from the model.

common_mistakes.incorrect: I have seen that movie yesterday.
common_mistakes.explanation: Use simple past with specific past time references.

rules.rule: Use passive voice when the focus is on the action, not who performed it.
rules.example: The results were analyzed using statistical software.
rules.ielts_usage: Common in Academic Writing to describe processes and findings objectively.

easy: The cake was baked by my mother.
medium: Data were collected through structured interviews.
The findings were interpreted within the theoretical framework.
ielts: Environmental regulations have been implemented to reduce industrial pollution.
Educational reforms are being introduced to improve learning outcomes.
academic: Methodological triangulation was employed to enhance the validity of the research findings.
Theoretical propositions were derived from an extensive literature review.

common_mistakes.incorrect: The letter was sent yesterday by John.
common_mistakes.correct: The letter was sent by John yesterday.
common_mistakes.explanation: Place time expressions at the end of passive sentences.
